title: Scene I — The Eyewitness Report

segments.ssml: <speak>USA's overseas-based beings were seen praying <break time="600ms"/> in a protesting church, <break time="600ms"/> bending heads upwards, <break time="600ms"/> gazing towards a church leader <break time="600ms"/> standing on a pedestal, <break time="600ms"/> all surrounded by Hollywoodian posters <break time="600ms"/> about the 2025 celestial games, <break time="600ms"/> soon to be held in various aerial fields <break time="600ms"/> atop their homeland territory.</speak>
segments.director_note: Bureaucratic precision. Each clause is a filed observation — the emotion lives in the words themselves, never performed. Typewriter bed under this segment (eyewitness underlay).
The eyewitness closes the file. Hold the silence — do not shorten.

overall_notes: Scene I is the actual incident report — the cathedral bell, organ drone, premonitory chorus, and report header now live in Scene 0 (Opening Invocation). EYEWITNESS continues from there.
